phases.name: Foundation (Shader + Addons + Scene Rebuild)
phases.description: Delete custom shaders, install addons, rebuild all 20 room scenes with interactables, connections, and lighting.

phases.name: Dialogue + Inventory + Audio Integration
phases.description: Create .dialogue files for all 20 rooms, integrate gloot inventory, AdaptiSound audio, and surface footsteps.

phases.name: State Machine + Camera + Events
phases.description: LimboAI HSM for game phases, Phantom Camera inspection, flashback system, room entry events.

phases.name: Save System + Quest Tracking + Polish
phases.description: SaveMadeEasy integration, quest tracking, UI decomposition, PSX dither fade transitions.

phases.name: Testing + Visual QA + Android Build
phases.description: All tests passing, screenshot walkthrough, 3 endings verified, Android APK export.

tasks.description: Delete custom shaders and install godot-psx screen-space shaders
acceptance_criteria: psx_fade.gdshader copied from godot-psx for room transitions

tasks.description: Update room_manager.gd fade system to use psx_fade shader instead of ColorRect alpha tween
acceptance_criteria: room_manager.gd fade system uses psx_fade shader alpha uniform
No ColorRect alpha tween remains for room transitions
Fade in/out still functional after shader swap

tasks.description: Verify all texture PNGs import with filter_nearest and no room .tscn has custom shader material overrides
acceptance_criteria: All texture PNGs confirmed importing with filter_nearest
No room .tscn has any material override with custom shaders
Game renders with visible dithering and color depth reduction

tasks.description: Update plug.gd with 3 new addon entries and run gd-plug install
acceptance_criteria: plug.gd updated with plug() calls for godot-material-footsteps, phantom-camera, and limboai
addons/ contains material_footsteps, phantom_camera, limboai directories
All 3 addons enabled in project.godot plugin section

tasks.description: Rebuild front_gate.tscn with 5 interactables (gate_plaque, gate_luggage, gate_bench, iron_gate, gate_lamp), 2 connections (to_foyer, to_garden), flickering gate lamp, and moonlight
acceptance_criteria: gate_plaque Area3D with metadata/id, metadata/type, collision layer 4
gate_luggage Area3D on luggage model position
gate_bench Area3D on bench model position
iron_gate Area3D on gate model position
to_foyer connection Area3D at (0, 1.5, 10) with collision layer 8
to_garden connection Area3D at (10, 1.5, 0) with collision layer 8
Gate lamp OmniLight3D has metadata/flickering = true

tasks.description: Rebuild foyer.tscn: enrich 4 existing interactables, add foyer_mail and foyer_stairs Area3Ds, wire 5 connections (parlor, dining_room, kitchen, upper_hallway, front_gate), add flickering sconces and chandelier
acceptance_criteria: Existing 4 interactables updated with enriched metadata/data content
foyer_mail Area3D added at (-5, 0.9, -4) on drawers
foyer_stairs Area3D added at (2, 1, -2) near staircase
All 5 connections present: parlor, dining_room, kitchen, upper_hallway, front_gate
Window light provides cold moonlight contrast

tasks.description: Rebuild parlor.tscn: enrich parlor_painting_1, parlor_note, music_box; add parlor_fireplace and parlor_tea Area3Ds; fireplace and candle flickering; parlor_note sets found_first_clue and knows_attic_girl flags
acceptance_criteria: parlor_painting_1, parlor_note, music_box updated with enriched content
Fireplace light has metadata/flickering = true with slow breathing pattern
Both candle lights have metadata/flickering = true
parlor_note interaction sets found_first_clue and knows_attic_girl flags

tasks.description: Rebuild dining_room.tscn from scratch: add 6 new interactables (dinner_photo, dining_pushed_chair, dining_wine_glass, dining_place_settings, dining_candles, dining_vessel), table candle flickering, connection to foyer
acceptance_criteria: 6 new Area3D interactables added with correct metadata/id, metadata/type, metadata/data
Both table candle lights have metadata/flickering = true
Connection to foyer present and correctly positioned at doorway

tasks.description: Rebuild kitchen.tscn from scratch: add 5 new interactables (kitchen_note, kitchen_cutting_board, kitchen_hearth, kitchen_knives, kitchen_bucket), hearth flickering, connections to foyer and storage_basement
acceptance_criteria: 5 new Area3D interactables with correct metadata
Connections to foyer AND storage_basement (stairs) both present

tasks.description: Rebuild upper hallway (hallway.tscn): add 5 interactables (attic_door locked_door, children_painting, hallway_mask, hallway_poster, hallway_switch), wire attic_door locked=true with key_id=attic_key, 4 connections, 2 flickering sconces
acceptance_criteria: 5 interactables: attic_door (locked_door type), children_painting, hallway_mask, hallway_poster, hallway_switch

tasks.description: Rebuild master_bedroom.tscn: enrich 3 existing interactables (diary, mirror, jewelry_box), add 4 new (bedroom_bed, bedroom_book, bedroom_wardrobe, bedroom_broken_bottle), wire jewelry_box locked puzzle, candle flickering
acceptance_criteria: Existing 3 interactables (diary, mirror, jewelry_box) metadata enriched
4 new Area3Ds: bedroom_bed, bedroom_book, bedroom_wardrobe, bedroom_broken_bottle
jewelry_box wired: locked=true, key_id=jewelry_key, item_found=elizabeths_locket, gives_also=lock_of_hair

tasks.description: Rebuild library.tscn: enrich 3 existing interactables, add 3 new (library_artifact, library_shelves, library_gears), wire library_globe to give attic_key, wire binding_book as pickable, 3 flickering lights
Rebuild guest_room.tscn from scratch: add 5 interactables (guest_ledger, helena_photo, guest_luggage, guest_bed, guest_lamp), connection to upper_hallway, candle flickering and window moonlight
acceptance_criteria: 5 new Area3Ds: guest_ledger, helena_photo, guest_luggage, guest_bed, guest_lamp

tasks.description: Rebuild storage_basement (storage.tscn in basement/): enrich scratched_portrait, add 3 new interactables (storage_mirror, storage_covered, storage_trunk), 3 connections (kitchen, boiler_room, wine_cellar), single candle flickering

Rebuild boiler_room.tscn: enrich maintenance_log, add 4 new interactables (boiler_clock, boiler_observation, boiler_pipes, boiler_mask), boiler glow with aggressive flicker, connection to storage_basement
acceptance_criteria: 4 new Area3Ds: boiler_clock, boiler_observation, boiler_pipes, boiler_mask
Boiler glow light with aggressive flicker

tasks.description: Rebuild wine_cellar.tscn: enrich wine_note and wine_box (locked puzzle), add 2 new interactables (wine_racks, wine_footprints), 2 torches with aggressive flicker, connection to storage_basement
acceptance_criteria: Existing wine_note and wine_box enriched; box wired locked=true, key_id=cellar_key, item_found=mothers_confession

tasks.description: Rebuild attic stairwell (stairwell.tscn): add 2 interactables (stairwell_debris, stairwell_wall), connections to upper_hallway and attic_storage, window moonlight, entry triggers entered_attic and elizabeth_aware flags
acceptance_criteria: Entry triggers entered_attic and elizabeth_aware flags

tasks.description: Rebuild attic_storage.tscn: add 6 interactables (elizabeth_portrait, porcelain_doll, elizabeth_letter, hidden_door locked_door, attic_window, elizabeth_trunk), doll multi-step logic metadata, hidden_door locked with hidden_key, candle flickering
acceptance_criteria: 6 Area3Ds: elizabeth_portrait, porcelain_doll (doll type), elizabeth_letter, hidden_door (locked_door), attic_window, elizabeth_trunk
Doll multi-step logic: first tap = examine, second (after letter) = extract hidden_key + make doll pickable
Candle near doll flickering, window moonlight

tasks.description: Rebuild hidden_chamber.tscn: add 5 interactables (elizabeth_final_note, chamber_drawings, hidden_mirror, ritual_circle ritual type, chamber_artifact), ritual_circle 3-step metadata, 2 candle flickering (ambient 0.9), connection to attic_storage, entry sets flags
acceptance_criteria: 5 Area3Ds: elizabeth_final_note, chamber_drawings, hidden_mirror, ritual_circle (ritual type), chamber_artifact

tasks.description: Rebuild garden.tscn: add 4 interactables + 3 connections (front_gate, chapel, greenhouse), moonlight and appropriate lighting
Rebuild chapel.tscn: add 5 interactables including baptismal_font (gives blessed_water), 1 connection to garden, appropriate flickering and lighting
Rebuild greenhouse.tscn: add 3 interactables including greenhouse_pot (gives gate_key), 1 connection to garden
Rebuild carriage_house.tscn: add 3 interactables including carriage_portrait (gives cellar_key), 1 connection to garden
Rebuild family_crypt.tscn: add 4 interactables including crypt_flagstone (gives jewelry_key), 1 locked connection (gate_key), torch flickering
Create dialogue/ directory structure and write .dialogue files for ground floor rooms (foyer, parlor, dining_room, kitchen) with conditional text variants using GameManager.has_flag()
acceptance_criteria: 4 .dialogue files written with ~ {id} titles for every interactable
Conditional variants using if GameManager.has_flag() / elif / else for 2-3 tiers
do GameManager.set_flag() mutations fire on read

tasks.description: Write .dialogue files for upper floor rooms (upper_hallway, master_bedroom, library, guest_room) with conditional text variants
acceptance_criteria: 4 .dialogue files with conditional variants for all interactable IDs
Flag mutations for key discovery moments

tasks.description: Write .dialogue files for basement rooms (storage_basement, boiler_room, wine_cellar) with conditional text variants
Write .dialogue files for attic rooms (attic_stairs, attic_storage, hidden_chamber) with conditional text variants
acceptance_criteria: 3 .dialogue files with conditional variants including Elizabeth encounter text

tasks.description: Write .dialogue files for all 6 grounds rooms (front_gate, garden, chapel, greenhouse, carriage_house, family_crypt) with conditional text variants
Create custom dialogue balloon scene (scenes/ui/document_balloon.tscn) with Victorian paper aesthetic: aged paper background (#D1C1A6), serif text (#332619), typewriter effect, tap to dismiss
acceptance_criteria: Custom balloon scene created at scenes/ui/document_balloon.tscn
Text color PAPER_TEXT (#332619) in serif font
Title centered, separated by decorative line
Text appears with typewriter effect (character by character)
Registered as default balloon in Dialogue Manager settings

tasks.description: Wire interaction_manager.gd to use Dialogue Manager: _handle_document() calls DialogueManager.show_dialogue_balloon() with room .dialogue resource and interactable ID as title
acceptance_criteria: _handle_document() calls DialogueManager.show_dialogue_balloon() with room .dialogue resource and interactable ID
Room .dialogue resource loaded on room_loaded signal
All 97 interactables display correct text through Dialogue Manager

tasks.description: Create gloot item_prototypes.tres ProtoTree with all 10 game items (5 keys, binding_book, doll, locket, blessed_water, confession)
acceptance_criteria: resources/item_prototypes.tres ProtoTree created with all 10 items
Items: attic_key, jewelry_key, cellar_key, gate_key, hidden_key, binding_book, porcelain_doll, elizabeths_locket, blessed_water, mothers_confession

tasks.description: Integrate gloot Inventory node into GameManager autoload: add has_item(), give_item(), remove_item() wrappers, pause menu CtrlInventory grid, item acquisition notification
acceptance_criteria: Inventory node added to GameManager autoload
GameManager.has_item(), give_item(), remove_item() wrap gloot API

tasks.description: Configure AdaptiSound as autoload replacing audio_manager.gd: map all 36 OGG loops to room IDs, set up base ambient layer with crossfade on transition
acceptance_criteria: All 36 OGG loops mapped to room IDs
Base ambient layer plays per room with crossfade on transition
Crossfade works correctly when walking between rooms

tasks.description: Configure AdaptiSound tension layer activation on elizabeth_aware flag, set up 7 reverb audio bus presets, add Area3D reverb zones to each room scene
acceptance_criteria: Tension layer activates when elizabeth_aware flag is set
Reverb audio buses configured per room type (7 presets)
Area3D reverb zones added to each room scene

tasks.description: Source/create 36 footstep audio files (9 surfaces x 4 variations), configure MaterialFootstepPlayer3D on PlayerController, map surface types, tag floor meshes in all 20 rooms with footstep_surface metadata
acceptance_criteria: 36 footstep audio files exist (9 surfaces x 4 variations)
Surface-to-sound mappings configured for all 9 surface types
Floor meshes in all 20 room scenes tagged with footstep_surface metadata
Marble (foyer) sounds distinct from wood (parlor) from stone (basement) from metal (boiler)

tasks.description: Create scripts/game_state_machine.gd extending LimboHSM with 4 game phase states (Exploration, Discovery, Horror, Resolution), wire GameManager.flag_set signal to HSM event dispatch
acceptance_criteria: GameManager.flag_set signal dispatches events to HSM
found_first_clue triggers Exploration to Discovery transition
entered_attic triggers any to Horror transition
knows_full_truth triggers Horror to Resolution transition
State changes connected to AdaptiSound layer activation
State changes connected to lighting parameter adjustments

tasks.description: Implement Elizabeth presence sub-HSM nested in Phase_Horror/Phase_Resolution with 4 states (Dormant, Watching, Active, Confrontation), driven by elizabeth_aware/entered_attic/found_hidden_chamber flags
acceptance_criteria: Watching: mirrors delay slightly, occasional peripheral shadow
Active: lights flicker, whispers audible, mirror shows her briefly
Confrontation: 'You found me' text, direct encounters
Transitions driven by flags: elizabeth_aware, entered_attic, found_hidden_chamber

tasks.description: Integrate Phantom Camera: add PhantomCameraHost to PlayerController, create ExplorationCam (priority 10), place InspectionCam PhantomCamera3D nodes in 9 key rooms per plan, wire interaction to set inspection camera priority
acceptance_criteria: Inspection PhantomCamera3D nodes placed in 9 key rooms
Interacting with key objects sets inspection camera priority to 20 for smooth transition
Dismissing document resets priority to 0 and camera returns
Room reveal cameras for foyer, attic_storage, hidden_chamber

tasks.description: Integrate shaky-camera-3d: wire ShakyCamera3D to player camera with head bob, discovery shake, attic entry shake, mirror event shake, ritual completion shake profiles
acceptance_criteria: NO shake during normal exploration or document reading

tasks.description: Implement flashback system: psx_fade dither transition, spawn horror character model, display text, despawn, camera shake; create 6 room-specific flashback triggers as one-time flagged events
acceptance_criteria: Flashback function: psx_fade dither then spawn horror model then text then despawn then return
Parlor flashback: bloodwraith (child-scale, seated) - 'She used to sit here'
Master bedroom flashback: plague_doctor behind bed
Dining room flashback: light surge - 'All eight, seated'
All flashbacks are one-time events (flag prevents re-trigger)

tasks.description: Implement room entry events: first-entry visited_{room_id} flags, room name display, ambient timed events per room (gate creak, water drip, pipe whisper, etc.), conditional events tied to elizabeth_aware flag
acceptance_criteria: Every room sets visited_{room_id} flag on first entry
Every room shows room name on entry (via UIOverlay)
Front gate: gate creak every 15-30s, wind gust every 20-40s
Boiler room: pipe whisper after 30s if elizabeth_aware
Wine cellar: torch gutter after 60s if elizabeth_aware
Hallway: child crying near attic door if elizabeth_aware
Hallway: attic door rattle after 30s if knows_attic_locked and no key

tasks.description: Replace GameManager save/load with SaveMadeEasy API: save current_room, inventory, flags, visited_rooms, interacted_objects, lights_toggled, quest states, HSM state; auto-save on room transitions, manual save in pause menu, encrypted save file
acceptance_criteria: Save data includes: current_room, inventory, flags, visited_rooms, interacted_objects, lights_toggled, quest states, HSM state
Manual save available in pause menu
Load game restores complete state including player position and room

tasks.description: Create 6 Quest resources for each puzzle chain using quest_system addon, wire quest start on puzzle discovery, quest complete on flag set, pause menu quest progress display, completion notification
acceptance_criteria: 6 Quest resources created for each puzzle chain
Quests start when player discovers the puzzle (locked door, locked box, etc.)
Quests complete when completion flag is set
Quest progress visible in pause menu

tasks.description: Decompose ui_overlay.gd (569 LOC) into 5 focused scripts: ui_landing.gd, ui_document.gd, ui_pause.gd, ui_ending.gd, ui_room_name.gd, each under 200 LOC; integrate gloot inventory display and quest progress into pause menu
acceptance_criteria: ui_overlay.gd split into: ui_landing.gd, ui_document.gd, ui_pause.gd, ui_ending.gd, ui_room_name.gd
Pause menu includes gloot inventory display and quest progress

verification.command: for f in scripts/ui/ui_landing.gd scripts/ui/ui_document.gd scripts/ui/ui_pause.gd scripts/ui/ui_ending.gd scripts/ui/ui_room_name.gd; do wc -l $f; done 2>/dev/null

tasks.description: Implement PSX dither fade for room transitions in room_manager.gd: animate psx_fade.gdshader alpha 0-255-0, with door (0.6s), stairs (0.8s), ladder (1.0s), and path (0.5s) transition durations
acceptance_criteria: room_manager.gd fade system uses psx_fade.gdshader alpha uniform
Tween animates shader alpha parameter 0 to 255 to 0
Dither pattern visible during fade (not smooth gradient)

tasks.description: Run test_room_specs.gd and fix all failures: verify all 20 rooms load, all ~97 interactables found by ID, all ~34 connections found by target, minimum light counts met, flickering metadata present where required
acceptance_criteria: All rooms have minimum light count met
All rooms with flickering have at least one metadata/flickering = true light

tasks.description: Run test_room_walkthrough.gd: visit every room, interact with all 97 objects, capture screenshots (overview + 4 directions + per-interactable per room), review for missing geometry/broken lighting/floating objects
acceptance_criteria: All 97 interactables found and interacted with (0 MISS)
Each room has overview + 4 direction shots + per-interactable shots
Visual QA review confirms no missing geometry, broken lighting, or floating objects

tasks.description: Run run_e2e.gd for all 3 endings: freedom ending (6 ritual components + counter-ritual + freed_elizabeth), escape ending (knows_full_truth + exit to front gate), joined ending (elizabeth_aware + !knows_full_truth + exit); also test save/load mid-game round-trip
acceptance_criteria: Freedom ending: all 6 ritual components collected, counter-ritual done, freed_elizabeth flag set
Escape ending: knows_full_truth + exit to front gate triggers escape
Joined ending: elizabeth_aware + !knows_full_truth + exit triggers joined
Save/load test: save mid-game, new game, load, verify state restored

tasks.description: Configure Android APK export: export_presets.cfg with Android target, ETC2/ASTC compression, verify touch controls (tap-to-walk, swipe-to-look, tap-to-interact)
Build APK, install on Android emulator, run Maestro E2E flows to verify installation, touch interaction, and basic navigation
acceptance_criteria: APK installs and runs on Android emulator
Maestro E2E flows pass on emulator
